title: Angular Fundamentals
subtitle: Components, templates, directives, pipes, and the new control flow syntax
description: Build a solid foundation in Angular's core concepts. From component anatomy and data binding to structural directives, pipes, and lifecycle hooks — these are the building blocks every Angular application is made of.
learningOutcomes: Explain component anatomy: selector, template, styles, and standalone flag
Use all four forms of data binding correctly
Apply both legacy (*ngIf/*ngFor) and new (@if/@for) control flow syntax
Create custom attribute directives and understand how Angular applies them
Build custom pipes and explain the difference between pure and impure
Compare NgModule and standalone component architectures
Know which lifecycle hook to use for initialization, cleanup, and view access
